recipes.title: Crusty bread
ingredients: 3 cups (450g)  flour (, bread or plain/all purpose (Note 1))
2 tsp instant or rapid rise yeast ((Note 2 for normal / active dry yeast))
1 1/2 tsp cooking salt / kosher salt (, HALVE if using table salt  (Note 3))
1 1/2 cups (375 ml)   very warm tap water (, NOT boiling or super hot (ie up to 55°C/130°F) (Note 4))

recipes.title: Peanut chicken lettuce wraps with ginger garlic sauce
ingredients: 1 tablespoon fresh ginger (I use a paste)
1 tablespoon rice vinegar (optional – makes it more tangy)
1 teaspoon cornstarch (optional – helps the sauce thicken)
12 leaves of lettuce (I used Boston lettuce)
chopped cilantro, green onions, and peanuts for topping
ingredients_normalized: cilantro green onions and peanuts for topping

Suggested - Shrimp tacos with mango slaw
Suggested - Sheet pan chicken thighs and vegetables
Tacos
ingredients: 3 tablespoons tomato paste ((see notes for using tomato sauce))
Oil, (for frying (vegetable oil, olive oil, or avocado oil are great))

recipes.title: Spaghetti
ingredients: 1  onion (, finely chopped (brown, yellow or white))
1 lb / 500g   beef mince (ground beef) (OR half pork, half beef (Note 1))
1/2 cup (125 ml)  dry red wine ((sub water or beef broth/stock))
2  beef bouillon cubes (, crumbled OR granulated beef bouillon (Note 2))
800g / 28 oz  can crushed tomato ((or tomato passata))
2  sprigs fresh thyme ((or 1/2 tsp dried thyme or oregano))

recipes.title: Suggested - Fried rice with egg and vegetables

Tortellini with pesto and shrimp and spinach
Tortellini with sausage, spinach, mushrooms, lemon
Chicken tortilla soup
ingredients: 2 lbs boneless skinless chicken breasts (about 2-3 breasts)
1 1/2 cups half-and-half or heavy cream (if desired, for a creamier soup)
2-3 tablespoons flour or cornstarch (if desired to make a thicker soup)
1 1/2 cups  frozen corn (optional, do not use canned)

recipes.title: Chicken tortilla soup in crock pot
ingredients: 2 lbs boneless skinless chicken breasts (about 2-3 breasts)
1 1/2 cups half-and-half or heavy cream (if desired, for a creamier soup)
2-3 tablespoons flour or cornstarch (if desired to make a thicker soup)
1 1/2 cups  frozen corn (optional, do not use canned)

recipes.title: Suggested - Miso soup with tofu and vegetables
Wonton soup
ingredients: 200 g / 7 oz   lean pork mince ((ground pork))
200 g / 7 oz   peeled prawns / shrimp (, roughly chopped)
2  shallots / green onions (, finely chopped (5 tbsp))
⅓" / 1 cm   piece of ginger (, sliced (optional, but highly recommended))
Bok choy (, quartered, or Chinese broccoli cut into 10cm /4" lengths (optional))
40 - 50 g / 1.5 - 1.75 oz   dried egg noodles per person (, (optional) (8))
ingredients_normalized: - g dried egg noodles per person

recipes.title: Stir fry
ingredients: 3  medium buk choy ( or other leafy greens of choice (Note 1))
1 1/2 tbsp soy sauce (, light or all purpose (not dark soy) (Note 2))
1 tbsp Chinese Cooking Wine or Mirin ((Note 3))
